no_solution_leakage.reason: instruction.md explicitly states the exact fix: create a constant named 'defaultCSSFileLoaderExts', configure 'api.LoaderFile' loaders when 'opts.IsCSS' is true, change 'loaderFromFilename' to return 'api.LoaderDefault' instead of 'api.LoaderJS', and include a specific comment phrase. This prescribes exactly WHAT to change, not just what's broken.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for gold-specific implementation details: the exact variable name 'defaultCSSFileLoaderExts' in resolve.go (test_css_loader_extension_constant_exists), the exact comment string 'default to the file loader for common static' (test_no_regression_in_loaderFromFilename), 'return api.LoaderDefault' in loaderFromFilename (test_loader_from_filename_returns_default). An alternative correct fix using a different variable name, different file, or different structure would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests test_css_loader_extension_constant_exists, test_css_loader_default_in_options, test_loader_from_filename_returns_default, and test_no_regression_in_loaderFromFilename are purely text-matching tests (assert 'X' in open(path).read()). test_not_tautological.reason: The integration test test_repo_css_integration_test runs the actual Go test TestCSSBuildLoadersDefault which would fail without the real fix. The compilation tests also verify structural correctness. A stub implementation cannot pass these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All six behaviors from instruction.md are tested: (1) defaultCSSFileLoaderExts constant, (2) automatic LoaderFile for CSS builds, (3) loaderFromFilename returning LoaderDefault, (4) comment phrase, (5) backward compatibility via existing tests, (6) TestCSSBuildLoadersDefault passing.
